donationMethod.notes: No obvious public method found for donating directly to Debbie Ngarewa-Packer personally; Te Pāti Māori has a Koha (donation) page.

sourcesChecked.notes: Found Parliament Office postal address (Private Bag 18888, Wellington 6160).
Bio page did not list a specific postal address (only authorisation line referencing Parliament Buildings, Wellington).
Contact page did not show a dedicated postal address (only authorisation line).
Found Te Pāti Māori Koha (donation) page with online donation form (party donation channel).
